title: agentic-workstation SKILL.md Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for bundled SKILL.md files. All fields except name and description are optional to maintain backwards compatibility.

name.description: Kebab-case skill name (must match the directory name and skill.json name).

description.description: Short human-readable summary (used in skill selection).

requires.description: CLI tools, commands, or env vars this skill needs.

produces.description: Artifact types this skill outputs (e.g. plan.md, PR, comment).

tools.description: AI tools this SKILL.md is verified to work with.

triggers.description: Natural-language phrases or events that should invoke this skill.
